productName: EDB GMY 100mg THCV - Blue Raspberry 1:1 10pk DOH
description: These sweet, tart raspberry chews feel like a 100-year-old family candy recipe upgraded for the cannabis era: soft, bright, and irresistibly flavorful. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. Enjoy slowly and let the infused finish settle in at its own pace.
